title: Agra: the city of love
description: Agra is not just about the Taj Mahal. It is about early morning walks, stories whispered by red sandstone walls, and sunsets that stay with you.
author: Sunkanya Kumari

title: Mathura: Krishna's birthplace
description: Mathura breathes devotion. From temple bells to the Yamuna ghats, every corner tells a story of faith and time.
author: Srishti Goyal

title: Temple Mornings in Vrindavan
description: From the first bell of Banke Bihari to the rising mist on Kesi Ghat — a dawn walk through India's most sacred town.
author: Braj Explorer

title: Gokul: A Quiet Pilgrim's Paradise
description: Sand, silence, and the sound of conch shells — Gokul offers a Braj experience untouched by mass tourism.
author: Braj Explorer

title: Barsana and the Spirit of Holi
description: The hilltop temples of Barsana turn into a canvas of colour weeks before the rest of India even prepares for Holi.
author: Braj Explorer

title: Govardhan: The Sacred Parikrama Trail
description: Walking the 21 km parikrama path around Giriraj — a journey of devotion, dust, and extraordinary stillness.
author: Braj Explorer
